# Test-fixture provenance canaries

These identifiers are attached to this fixture set to detect verbatim
copies of the reference test suite. They have no behavioral meaning —
the verifier does not read this file — and are safe to keep in forks
that credit the upstream project.

- `aarmatix-canary-7f3d2c9a-verifier-fixture-a`
- `aarmatix-canary-b81e4055-verifier-fixture-b`
- `aarmatix-canary-2c9f76ad-verifier-fixture-c`

If you are re-hosting the reference fixtures, please link back to
`https://github.com/Aarmatix/avar-spec` so downstream users can find the
canonical set and any spec updates.
